home.title: 🧠 Cognitive Ability Test
home.subtitle:
Welcome to the Cognitive Ability Assessment
Designed by Cognitive Expert Feng-Yue Wu
This test evaluates your:

ability_cards.mem_desc: Evaluates short-term memory by recalling sequences.
ability_cards.rea_desc: Evaluates reaction time and inhibitory control.
ability_cards.spa_desc: Evaluates mental rotation and spatial imagination.
ability_cards.att_desc: Evaluates stability based on the average of three skills.

home.guest_warning:
⚠️ Guest Mode does not save scores or track your progress.
We recommend Logging in to record your cognitive trends.

login.title: 🔐 User Login
login.info: Log in to view your test history and progress trends.

register.title: 📝 Register Account
register.info: Register to save your test records and track your progress.

profile.title: 📝 Basic Profile
profile.warning: ⚠️ Please enter accurate information for age-based norm comparisons.

instructions.title: 📖 Instructions
instructions.practice_hint: 💡 Hint: Practice questions do not affect your final score.

mem.title: 🧠 Memory Test
steps: A sequence of {min} to {max} shapes will appear on screen.
Each shape shows for 2 seconds. Memorize the order.
Afterward, tap the shapes in the exact order they appeared.
If you make a mistake, tap again to deselect.
There are 5 questions with an increasing 10-second limit.
mem.tip: Pay attention to both the color and the shape.

rea.title: ⚡ Reaction Test
steps: Then, a Test Shape will appear. Decide if it is exactly the same in both shape and color.
If completely identical, tap 'Same'. Otherwise, tap 'Different'.
There are 10 questions with a 5-second limit each.
rea.tip: BOTH shape and color must match to be considered 'Same'.

seq.title: ⚡ Number Sequence
steps: A grid of scrambled numbers will appear.
Tap the numbers in order as fast as possible (1 → 2 → 3...).
Wrong taps won't fail you, but add a +2 second penalty.
No time limit. Just finish as quickly as you can!
seq.tip: Don't panic! Scan the whole grid before you start tapping.

spa.title: 🔄 Spatial Ability
steps: Two shapes will appear on the screen.
One is rotated. Decide if they are the exact same shape.
First 5 Qs: Both shape & color must match. Last 5 Qs: ONLY shape matters.
There are 10 questions with a 5-second limit each.
spa.tip: Mentally 'rotate' the shape back to compare them.

test.mem_answer: Tap the shapes in the order they appeared
test.rea_instruction: Are they the same in BOTH shape and color?
test.spa_strict_question: Are they the same shape & color? (Ignore rotation)
test.spa_strict_instruction: Are both the shape and color identical? (Ignore rotation)

spa_break.title: Spatial Test — Part 2
spa_break.subtitle:
The first 5 questions are done. The difficulty will now increase.
Please review the rules before continuing.
rules: For the last 5 Qs: IGNORE COLOR. Only check if the shapes match.
Mentally 'rotate' the objects to compare them.
You won't be notified of wrong answers until the end.
spa_break.tip: For the remaining questions, only look at the shape. Ignore the color!

results.title: 🎉 Test Results
results.btn_learn_more: 💡 Learn how to improve cognitive skills
results.att_calc_note: Calculated from Memory, Reaction, and Spatial speed.
results.radar_subtitle: Dashed = Norm for Age {age} (70%) | Red = Your Score | Beyond dashed line means above average
results.recommend_basis: Personalized advice based on your lowest scoring area
results.recommend_closing_1: The brain is plastic! With regular practice, all cognitive abilities can improve.
results.recommend_closing_2: We recommend 10-15 minutes of targeted practice daily. Take the test again in 4 weeks to see your growth.
results.recommend_closing_3: 💪 Keep it up! Your progress starts today.
results.percentile_hint_1: 📊 A higher percentile means you performed better than a larger percentage of your peers.
results.percentile_hint_2: 🎯 E.g., 80th Percentile = Better than 80% of people your age.
results.percentile_att_note: Focus is a combined score of Memory, Reaction, and Spatial abilities.
results.history_empty_desc: Your test records will appear here after completion.
